name: frontend-design
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with deep UI craft and animation discipline.

interface.shortDescription: Create distinctive frontends with deep UI craft and animation discipline
interface.longDescription: Generates production-grade frontend code (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Vue) with bold, distinctive aesthetic choices and deep design-engineering discipline (animation timing, easing, component polish, performance). Avoids generic AI design defaults.
defaultPrompt: Create a dashboard for a music streaming app
Build a landing page for an AI security startup
Design a settings panel with dark mode
Build a portfolio site with a brutalist aesthetic
Review my dropdown for animation polish
Help me build a button that feels right
